column7: C. (2026). Ecuadorian Tamarind ISSR Dataset and FAIR-Compliant Python Workflow for Genetic Diversity Analysis.;

Field: Original Study,"Sarmiento L, P├®rez-Almeida I, D├¡az B, ├ülvarez H, Viera W. Molecular marker-based characterization of Ecuadorian dry forest tamarind plus trees. Bioagro. 2017;"29(3):153-162."""

Curation Note,"The original publication reported 84 loci generated from 19 ISSR primers. Only 12 informative primers were retained for statistical analysis, resulting in a final binary matrix of 62 loci. This curated dataset corresponds to the 62 loci actually used in downstream analyses.";
